messages.content: who is the president of sri lanka
The current president of Sri Lanka is Anura Kumara Dissanayake, who has been in office since 2024.

sources.title: President of Sri Lanka - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: The president of Sri Lanka (Sinhala: ශ්‍රී ලංකා ජනාධිපති Ś r ī Laṅk ā Janādhipati; Tamil: இலங்கை ஜனாதிபதி Ilaṇkai janātipati) is the head of state and head of government of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka . The president is the chief executive of the union government and the commander-in-chief of the Sri Lanka ...

sources.title: President of Sri Lanka
sources.snippet: Official website of the President of Sri Lanka . News, policies, media, and contact information.

sources.title: Anura Kumara Dissanayake - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Anura Kumara Dissanayake[b] (born 24 November 1968), commonly referred to by his initials AKD, is a Sri Lankan politician who has served as the tenth president of Sri Lanka since 2024. [2][3][4][5] Dissanayake is the first Sri Lankan president to be elected in a second round of vote counting, [6][7] and the first not to be a member of the traditional political parties of Sri Lanka . [8] He is ...

sources.title: President | Presidential Secretariat
sources.snippet: Information about the President of Sri Lanka , including current and former Presidents .

sources.title: Anura Kumara Dissanayake | Biography, Career, & Facts | Britannica
sources.snippet: Anura Kumara Dissanayake is the ninth executive president of Sri Lanka (2024- ) and leader of the leftist Janatha Vimukthi Peramuna (JVP) party.

messages.content: what are the current fuel prices in sri lanka

I couldn't find the current fuel prices in Sri Lanka from the search results provided. The most recent information I found is for March 2026, and I don't have real-time access to the current prices.

However, some websites like Ceylon Petroleum Corporation, Welandapola, Lankacalculator.com, FuelPrice.lk, and Fuelpass.lk provide updated fuel prices in Sri Lanka. You can visit these websites for the most recent information on petrol, diesel, and kerosene rates.
